rulings.Case Title: NANU, L.P. VS. MONICA AMBROSE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday August 9, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT MONICA AMBROSE Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment is GRANTED. Defendant shall file her answer and post $2,940.62 with the Court by 4:00 p.m. on August 9, 2016. = (501/REQ)
